text_blocks.text: TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions
text_blocks.label: section_header

text_blocks.text: 1. 18 AWG 90C wire (red and black) 2. Zip ties 3. Label maker 4. WAGO 221-415 5-position lever nuts 5. WAGO 221-612 2-position lever nuts (10 AWG) 6. Wire cutter/snips 7. 3/32' hex drive bit 8. 1/8' hex drive bit 9. 5/32 hex drive bit 10. Precision flat head screwdriver
text_blocks.label: text

text_blocks.text: 1. Drill holes in enclosure for antenna, 2x vents, and 1' NPT conduit fitting.
text_blocks.label: text

text_blocks.text: Install the antenna base into the top enclosure hole. Be sure to lubricate the o-ring before tightening.
text_blocks.label: list_item

full_text: TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions Materials Required Procedure Kitting Instructions FLVM Assembly Instructions 2-4-2026.docx Materials Required 1. 18 AWG 90C wire (red and black) 2. Zip ties 3. Label maker 4. WAGO 221-415 5-position lever nuts 5. WAGO 221-612 2-position lever nuts (10 AWG) 6. Wire cutter/snips 7. 3/32' hex drive bit 8. 1/8' hex drive bit 9. 5/32 hex drive bit 10. Precision flat head screwdriver Small and large Phillips screwdriver Procedure 1. Drill holes in enclosure for antenna, 2x vents, and 1' NPT conduit fitting. Install the antenna base into the top enclosure hole. Be sure to lubricate the o-ring before tightening.
